# Account Move Line Product

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module enhances the views associated to account moves and account
move lines to display the product that is associated to the move line.

This will be relevant in perpetual inventory, for inventory-related
account moves.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Configuration

In order to see the Journal Items page and Journal Entries menu in the
account move form view you need to have Technical / Show Accounting
Features - Readonly enabled.

To do so, you need to:

1. Enable Developer Mode
2. Go to Settings -> User & Companies -> Groups
3. Select the "Technical / Show Full Accounting Features - Readonly"
   group
4. Change the application field to Accounting
5. Select a user and save
6. Refresh the invoicing page
